turns.content: The hard problem of consciousness is interesting because it's the one question where introspection seems to be our only data source.
Right â€” we can't get outside our own subjective experience to study it objectively. Do you find the qualia argument compelling?
Somewhat. I think Chalmers' zombie argument works as a thought experiment but I'm less convinced it tracks metaphysical possibility rather than just conceivability.
